backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Trip, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app, including role-based access control, user profile management, and trip operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features in RideRequestForm.tsx: conditional rendering of pickup fields based on GPS/manual location mode, and auto-reverting to manual mode with an error message when GPS permission is denied.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles and recent changes across the React app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'Namma Driver Pilot', mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file setting up TanStack Router with role-based route guards for customer, driver, admin, and admin-upgrade routes, and conditionally showing the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Admin UI component rendering a searchable, scrollable table of all trips with customer/driver lookup, formatted locations, and color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, scrollable table of all users with their email, full name, role (color-coded badge), and join date. Fetches data via the `useGetAllUsers` hook.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips available for drivers to accept, displaying pickup/dropoff locations and creation time. Handles trip acceptance via the `useAcceptTrip` mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and timestamps. Fetches trip data using the `useGetMyTrips` hook.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card including service area, vehicle experience, languages, earnings, and duty status, with duty status locked to On-Duty when an active trip exists. Provides an Edit Profile button and handles loading/error states with skeletons.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's trips segmented into current (accepted), completed, and cancelled sections, with a 'Mark as Completed' button for the active trip. Uses `useGetMyTrips` and `useCompleteTrip` hooks with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form for editing a driver's profile including service pincode/area, vehicle experience checkboxes, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle. Availability is locked to true when the driver has an accepted trip.
Dialog wrapper that renders `EditDriverProfileForm` inside a modal for editing a driver's profile. Passes through the `hasAcceptedTrip` flag to lock availability during active trips.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper that composes the Navigation component, a main content area, and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link. Provides a consistent full-height flex column structure for all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component that shows the app logo and a user dropdown menu with role-based dashboard navigation and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their email and full name to create an initial profile without a role assigned yet.
Form component for customers to create trip requests, supporting local/outstation trip types, one-way/round-trip journey types, GPS or manual location input, and vehicle selection.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that prompts users to permanently select their role (customer, driver, or admin) after profile creation, with an admin code gate for the admin role.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query, exposing loading and fetched states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, role management, admin upgrade, trip creation, and trip retrieval using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using OKLCH values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, total user/trip stats, and tabbed views for managing users and trips.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page that allows a user to enter a secret setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role, navigating to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's past and current trips side by side.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for available trips and the driver's own trips, plus a driver profile section with an edit modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section and login button that redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard after profile fetch.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Displays a role selection page (Customer, Driver, Admin) for authenticated users without an assigned role, redirecting already-roled users to their respective dashboards and unauthenticated users to the landing page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, font family, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Namma Driver Pilot, recording existing features around GPS/manual pickup mode visibility in RideRequestForm.tsx and architectural notes about locationMode state handling.
